name: Kentucky DHBC Trade Licensee Search

agency.name: Kentucky Department of Housing, Buildings and Construction

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official DHBC search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Kentucky DHBC licensee records for building inspection, electrical, HVAC, plumbing, fire, manufactured housing, and related programs exposed by the official search
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to DHBC licensee search records and does not represent every local contractor license, permit, or business registration in Kentucky.
Kentucky general contractor licensing may be local or otherwise outside DHBC trade-license scope.
The DHBC search spans many divisions and license types; adapter work must filter construction-relevant records carefully.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official export options if discovered before considering lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DHBC lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Kentucky DHBC trade licensee search. Future work should decide whether electrical, HVAC, plumbing, fire, and manufactured-housing records need separate source entries or filters.
maintainerNotes: Do not flatten all DHBC license types into contractor records without source-specific type mapping.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
